subject: [PATCH v3 3/8] io_uring/kbuf: add buffer ring pinning/unpinning

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch adds kernel APIs to pin and unpin buffer rings, preventing userspace from unregistering a pinned ring. This is necessary for fuse to safely access buffer ring contents in atomic contexts. The patch introduces two new functions: io_uring_buf_ring_pin and io_uring_buf_ring_unpin, which allow the kernel to pin and unpin buffer rings respectively. When a buffer ring is pinned, userspace cannot unregister it until it is explicitly unpinned, preventing potential data corruption or crashes.
